enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Athuvutta Athuvutta?

The song conveys a lively and playful spirit, encouraging listeners to enjoy and celebrate life.

What is the plot context of the song in Pokkiri Raja?

This song is featured in a fun and energetic sequence that highlights the carefree nature of the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by D Imman, who is known for his catchy and vibrant music.

When was Athuvutta Athuvutta released?

The song was released on February 9, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Athuvutta Athuvutta, the lively beats and playful lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song is a perfect fit for party scenes in Pokkiri Raja, where characters embrace life with enthusiasm. It evokes feelings of happiness and energy, making it a favorite among fans. The catchy tune and engaging rhythm ensure that it resonates well with audiences looking for a fun experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Athuvutta Athuvutta from Pokkiri Raja is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. With D Imman's catchy beats and playful lyrics by Vivek, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Athuvutta Athuvutta just like that Athuvutta.
I have placed my eyes on you and am looking around.
Touching it gives a shock, letting it go brings darkness. Oh no, it feels bad.
Pain has come and is settling in.
Breaking apart, the mind is disturbed. Oh, thinking of her, I am crying out.
Athuvutta Athuvutta just like that Athuvutta.
I have placed my eyes on you and am looking around.
There is a thorn in my heart... it hurts a lot, why is this little thing bothering me?
Is love running away from me?
Breaking apart, the mind is disturbed. Oh, thinking of her, I am crying out.
Someone said love is like a current, my friend, it has come and gone.
How many girls are there who can give life, my friend, I am just a wandering fool.
This is the Pakistan border, this is an order for acceptance, a warning board, she won't give it.
In my eyes, I have a stone. If I close my eyes, there are stones in my sight, is it a joke?
Breaking apart, the mind is disturbed. Oh, thinking of her, I am crying out.
Athuvutta Athuvutta just like that Athuvutta.
I have placed my eyes on you and am looking around.
God and the eye must meet. If he gets a girl, then our troubles will be understood.
Is she making mistakes in her actions?
Breaking apart, breaking apart, breaking apart, breaking apart.
Breaking apart, the mind is disturbed. Oh, thinking of her, I am crying out.
Oh!
